name: Kartoffelklosse (Potato Dumplings)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potatoes, in their jackets, until tender.
2. Peel and rice the potatoes.
3. Add the eggs, salt, and flour to a bowl.
4. Beat the batter until it is fluffy.
5. Roll lightly into 1-inch balls.
6. Place one crouton in the center of each ball.
7. Bring a pot of salted water to a boil.
8. Reduce heat to bring the water to a gentle boil.
9. Drop the dumplings lightly into the water, one at a time.
10. Cook, covered, for 10 minutes.
11. Drain well.
12. Melt the butter.
13. Stir in the breadcrumbs.
14. Pour the buttered breadcrumbs over the dumplings.
15. Serve.
